contact.note: Direct phone number and email are provided by a human agent upon request

services.name: Botox (Botulinum Toxin)
services.notes: Prices start from £200; final price depends on area treated and units required. Discussed at consultation.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.notes: Prices from £250; vary by area and volume of filler used.

services.name: Consultation
services.notes: Free initial consultation for all new clients. Patch test may be required 48 hours before certain treatments.

services.name: Anti-Wrinkle Treatment
services.notes: Covers fine line relaxation for early-stage wrinkles. Suitable for prevention as well as treatment.

services.name: Skin Boosters (Profhilo / Hydrafill)
services.sessions_recommended: 2 sessions, 4 weeks apart, then maintenance every 6 months
services.notes: Deeply hydrates and remodels skin. Not a filler — spreads under the skin to improve elasticity and glow.

services.name: Chemical Peels
services.notes: Improves skin texture, pigmentation, and tone. Mild peeling may occur 2-5 days post-treatment.

services.name: Microneedling (Collagen Induction Therapy)
services.notes: Stimulates collagen production. Downtime: mild redness for 24-48 hours.

services.name: Vitamin Infusion Drips (IV Therapy)
services.notes: Administered by qualified nurse. Patch test and health screening required before first session.

booking_policy.deposit_note: A deposit may be required to secure bookings for certain treatments
booking_policy.patch_test: Required 48 hours before first injectable or skin treatment for new clients

faqs.question: Is Botox safe?
faqs.answer: All our treatments are carried out by qualified medical professionals. Safety and client wellbeing are our top priority. We recommend a free consultation to discuss your medical history before any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does Botox last?
faqs.answer: Botox results typically last 3 to 6 months, depending on the individual and the area treated. Regular maintenance helps results last longer over time.

faqs.question: Is there any downtime after fillers?
faqs.answer: Most clients experience mild swelling or bruising for 24-72 hours after dermal fillers. We advise avoiding strenuous exercise, alcohol, and extreme heat for 24 hours post-treatment.

faqs.question: Can I book online?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can book via WhatsApp or through our website. We'll confirm your appointment and send a reminder 24 hours before.

faqs.question: Do you offer payment plans?
faqs.answer: Payment plan options are discussed during consultation. Please speak with our team directly for details.

faqs.question: What should I do before my appointment?
faqs.answer: Arrive with clean skin, free of makeup where possible. Avoid alcohol for 24 hours before injectables. New clients should arrive 10 minutes early to complete a health form.

escalation_rules: Medical question, health concern, or adverse reaction query
Request for specific medical or clinical advice
More than 2 questions the AI cannot answer from the SOP
Customer requests to speak to a human or manager
Questions about ongoing or past treatments at another clinic

staff.note: Staff names and direct contact details are not shared via the AI assistant. A team member will be assigned upon booking.

location.note: Clinic address and directions are provided upon booking confirmation by a human team member.
